mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(VSTO_CNT, 0)), 0) AS COUNT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VSTO_CCTN_L WHERE
TO_DATE(#{searchFromDate}, 'YYYY. MM. DD') <= TO_DATE(CCTN_DT, 'YYYY. MM. DD') AND TO_DATE(CCTN_DT, 'YYYY. MM. DD') <= TO_DATE(#{searchToDate}, 'YYYY. MM. DD')

SELECT eqm.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , epr.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , epr.RGSN_TS , epr.DISPLAY_DATE
, eqm.INVM_CMP_ID , eqm.RQST_ENPR_ID , eim_vc.ETNM AS INVM_CMP_NM , eim_com.ETNM AS RQST_ENPR_NM
, eqm.EXNT_RSLT_CD , CASE WHEN eqm.EXNT_RSLT_CD IS NULL THEN '미정' ELSE ccd_rslt.COM_CD_NM END AS EXNT_RSLT_NM
, NVL(eqm.INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT, 0) AS INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT
, CASE WHEN eqm.INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT IS NULL THEN '미정'
ELSE REGEXP_REPLACE(REVERSE(REGEXP_REPLACE( REVERSE(TO_CHAR( NVL(eqm.INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT, 0) ) ), '([0-9]{3})','\1,')), '^,','') END AS INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT_STR FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M eqm INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC) AS RNK , RGSN_TS , TO_CHAR(RGSN_TS, 'YYYY. MM. DD') AS DISPLAY_DATE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) epr ON (eqm.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = epr.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID) INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_epr ON (epr.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = ccd_epr.COM_CD_ID)
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_vc ON eim_vc.UTLINSTT_ID = eqm.INVM_CMP_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_com ON eim_com.UTLINSTT_ID = eqm.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_rslt ON ccd_rslt.COM_CD_ID = eqm.EXNT_RSLT_CD
WHERE 1=1 AND ccd_epr.COM_CD_ID = #{invmExntPgsgCd}
AND TO_DATE(epr.DISPLAY_DATE, 'YYYY. MM. DD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchFromDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchToDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY epr.RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M A INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID, INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC) AS RNK, TO_CHAR(RGSN_TS, 'YYYY. MM. DD') AS DISPLAY_DATE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) B ON (A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID) INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON (B.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID) WHERE C.COM_CD_ID = #{invmExntPgsgCd}
AND TO_DATE(B.DISPLAY_DATE, 'YYYY. MM. DD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchFromDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchToDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
